ordinanceLabel: 2025 California Building Standards Code · Town of Danville Municipal Code
fhszNotes: Partial — hillside and East Bay Hills areas designated VHFHSZ (LRA) per State Fire Marshal 2025 updated maps. Valley floor areas are not in VHFHSZ.
